narrative:
West Chester Twp 29 (precinct in Butler County) has 1,512 registered voters, with 62.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.5%, a clear Republican lean of 8.8 percentage points.
